title: stomatanthes oblongifolius
intro: Stomatanthes oblongifolius, also known as the Brazilian angelica tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Stomatanthes oblongifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use in treating various gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
